data.name: Common.Cancel.Tip
data.value: Discard your changes and go back.

data.name: Common.Load.Tip
data.value: Load the records for the tenant above.

data.name: Common.Refresh.Tip
data.value: Reload this page's data from the services.

data.name: Common.TenantId.Tip
data.value: The tenant (GUID) whose records you are managing.

data.name: Nav.Dashboard.Tip
data.value: Live operator overview: revenue, orders, products, open RMAs and ledger balance.

data.name: Nav.Catalog.Tip
data.value: Create and edit products, variants, prices, images and attributes.

data.name: Nav.Offers.Tip
data.value: Supplier supply profiles: fulfilment type, price model, billing period, priority.

data.name: Nav.Orders.Tip
data.value: Browse orders; cancel unpaid ones and refund paid ones.

data.name: Nav.Rmas.Tip
data.value: Approve, deny and receive customer return requests.

data.name: Nav.Ledger.Tip
data.value: The double-entry ledger — every posted entry and its lines.

data.name: Nav.XeroSync.Tip
data.value: Post daily summary journals to Xero and review past sync runs.

data.name: Nav.XeroMappings.Tip
data.value: Map ledger account codes to Xero account codes, with scope precedence.

data.name: Nav.Imports.Tip
data.value: Run catalog importers and review what each run read, accepted and rejected.

data.name: Nav.Rbac.Tip
data.value: Compose roles from the code-defined permission set; enforced by the Identity PDP.

data.name: Nav.Users.Tip
data.value: The accounts that sign in to a tenant: reset passwords, change emails.

data.name: Nav.Entities.Tip
data.value: Party master data, supplier onboarding, and the maker-checker change-request queue.

data.name: Nav.CommerceOps.Tip
data.value: Storefronts, domains, publication, tax regime and the policy surfaces around them.

data.name: Nav.PaymentAccounts.Tip
data.value: Tenant and storefront payment provider accounts and their lifecycle.

data.name: Nav.SupplierPayouts.Tip
data.value: Tokenized supplier bank accounts and the payout instructions that use them.

data.name: Nav.MissionControl.Tip
data.value: Cross-service read-only ops: audit activity, scheduled jobs, message-bus health.

data.name: Nav.Security.Tip
data.value: Your two-factor enrolment, the tenant MFA policy, and webhook signing secrets.

data.name: Nav.Logout.Tip
data.value: End your admin session and return to the sign-in page.

data.name: Nav.Language.Tip
data.value: The language of the admin interface for your session. It is stored in a cookie against your browser and is independent of currency, tax and other financial configuration.

data.name: Nav.Language.Apply.Tip
data.value: Switch the interface to the selected language and reload the page.

data.name: Login.Error.Mfa
data.value: This account has MFA enabled — enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app (or a recovery code).

data.name: Login.Error.Invalid
data.value: Invalid credentials or not an admin account.

data.name: Login.Email.Tip
data.value: Your operator email. The admin console requires the 'admin' role.

data.name: Login.Code.Tip
data.value: Only needed when MFA is enabled on your account (Security page). Leave empty otherwise. Recovery codes work here too.

data.name: Login.SignIn.Tip
data.value: Sign in to the admin console.

data.name: Home.Kpi.Revenue.Tip
data.value: Gross revenue across every order the Ordering service has recorded.

data.name: Home.Kpi.Products.Tip
data.value: Products in the tenant catalog (first 200 sampled).

data.name: Home.Kpi.OpenRmas.Tip
data.value: Return requests still awaiting an operator decision.

data.name: Home.Kpi.Ledger.Tip
data.value: Debits minus credits across the ledger. A healthy double-entry ledger sums to zero.

data.name: Catalog.Search.Tip
data.value: Filter products by title or slug.

data.name: Catalog.New.Tip
data.value: Start a new product with one empty variant.

data.name: Catalog.Field.Title.Tip
data.value: The product name customers see. Clear and specific (e.g. 'Borealis Ultra Speaker 22').

data.name: Catalog.Field.Slug.Tip
data.value: URL-friendly identifier (lowercase, hyphens). Must be unique — it forms the storefront link.

data.name: Catalog.Field.Brand.Tip
data.value: Manufacturer or brand shown on the product.

data.name: Catalog.Field.Description.Tip
data.value: Customer-facing description shown on the product page. Plain text.

data.name: Catalog.Field.Category.Hint
data.value: (required — products without one are not searchable)

data.name: Catalog.Field.Category.Tip
data.value: The catalog category this product belongs to. Required: an uncategorised product is not searchable.

data.name: Catalog.Field.ProductType.Hint
data.value: (what shoppers browse/filter by; billing mechanics live on the Offer — ADR-0028)

data.name: Catalog.Field.ProductType.Tip
data.value: The customer-facing kind of product. Subscription/usage-based products are billed via their Offer.

data.name: Catalog.Variant.Sku.Tip
data.value: Stock-keeping unit — your unique code for this variant.

data.name: Catalog.Variant.Price.Tip
data.value: Base price in minor units (cents): 1999 = €19.99. Fallback when no per-currency price is set. Enter the FINAL shelf price: AU GST / EU VAT storefront prices INCLUDE tax; US storefront prices EXCLUDE it (tax added at checkout) — ADR-0038.

data.name: Catalog.Variant.Stock.Tip
data.value: Units available to sell for this variant.

data.name: Catalog.Variant.Add.Tip
data.value: Add another sellable variant (SKU, price, stock) to this product.

data.name: Catalog.Prices.Note
data.value: Per-currency prices (tenant-set, no FX — a storefront hides this product if its currency has no price here). Enter the FINAL shelf price for each currency: on AU GST / EU VAT storefronts the price INCLUDES tax, on US storefronts tax is ADDED at checkout (ADR-0038).

data.name: Catalog.Prices.Price.Tip
data.value: FINAL shelf price in minor units for this currency: includes tax on AU GST / EU VAT storefronts; excludes tax (added at checkout) on US storefronts — ADR-0038.

data.name: Catalog.Prices.Add.Tip
data.value: Add a price for another currency on this variant.

data.name: Catalog.Image.Add.Tip
data.value: Add another product image (paste a URL or upload a file).

data.name: Catalog.Attr.Key.Tip
data.value: Attribute name (e.g. colour, size). Used for storefront filtering.

data.name: Catalog.Save.Tip
data.value: Save this product and return to the list.

data.name: Offers.Intro
data.value: Manage Catalog Offers: product/variant × supplier supply profiles, fulfilment type, price model, billing period, priority, and active state.

data.name: Offers.ProductFilter.Tip
data.value: Optional product GUID filter — leave blank for every offer in the tenant.

data.name: Offers.Edit.Tip
data.value: Load this offer into the form below.

data.name: Offers.Field.VariantId.Tip
data.value: Optional variant GUID. Blank applies to the product.

data.name: Offers.Field.SupplyCategory.Tip
data.value: Physical/Digital/Service compatibility is enforced by Catalog.

data.name: Offers.Field.Active.Tip
data.value: Inactive offers are never selected at checkout.

data.name: Offers.Tier.FromQty.Tip
data.value: The quantity at which this tier's unit price starts to apply.

data.name: Offers.Tier.UnitPrice.Tip
data.value: Unit price in minor units once this tier's quantity is reached.

data.name: Offers.Save.Tip
data.value: Create or update the offer from the form above.

data.name: Offers.Error.TenantGuid
data.value: Tenant ID must be a valid GUID.

data.name: Offers.Error.ProductGuid
data.value: Product ID must be a valid GUID.

data.name: Offers.Error.SupplierGuid
data.value: Supplier ID must be a valid GUID.

data.name: Orders.Intro
data.value: Cancel an unpaid order (Pending/Awaiting payment), or refund a confirmed (paid) one. Refunds reverse the ledger; the order's own status stays Confirmed.

data.name: Orders.Col.Payment.Tip
data.value: How the shopper chose to pay at checkout.

data.name: Orders.Cancel.Tip
data.value: Cancel this unpaid order (releases it). Click twice to confirm.

data.name: Orders.Refund.Tip
data.value: Refund the full order total — reverses the ledger. Click twice to confirm.

data.name: Orders.Status.Refunded
data.value: Refund requested — it will appear in the RMA queue and the order will show Refunded once complete.

data.name: Rma.Refresh.Tip
data.value: Reload the queue — the saga applies the transition asynchronously, so the row catches up a moment later.

data.name: Rma.Approve.Tip
data.value: Refund now — no physical return required.

data.name: Rma.ApproveReturn.Tip
data.value: Approve, but require the item back before the refund is issued.

data.name: Rma.MarkReceived.Tip
data.value: Mark the returned item received — this releases the refund.

data.name: Rma.Restock.Tip
data.value: Optionally choose which returned items go back into stock before marking the return received.

data.name: Rma.Restock.Hint
data.value: Leave everything unchecked to mark the return received without restocking.

data.name: Rma.Restock.Submit.Tip
data.value: Mark the return received and put the selected items back on hand at the chosen location.

data.name: Rma.Restock.NoLines
data.value: Order lines are unavailable — you can still mark the return received.

data.name: Rma.Restock.NoLocations
data.value: No inventory locations found. Create one before restocking.

data.name: Xero.PostYesterday.Tip
data.value: Post yesterday's summary journal to Xero. Safe to retry — the run is keyed by date.

data.name: XeroMap.Intro
data.value: Map ledger account codes to Xero account codes with tenant default, storefront, category, supplier, or product precedence.

data.name: XeroMap.TenantId.Tip
data.value: The tenant whose Xero mappings you are managing.

data.name: XeroMap.Edit.Tip
data.value: Load this mapping into the form below.

data.name: XeroMap.Field.Ledger.Tip
data.value: Payments ledger account code, e.g. revenue.sales.

data.name: XeroMap.Field.Scope.Tip
data.value: More specific scopes win over tenant defaults.

data.name: XeroMap.Field.Target.Tip
data.value: Storefront/category/supplier/product GUID for scoped mappings; blank for tenant default.

data.name: XeroMap.Field.Target.NotApplicable
data.value: No target — tenant-default scope applies to the whole tenant.

data.name: XeroMap.Field.Active.Tip
data.value: Inactive mappings are ignored when posting to Xero.

data.name: XeroMap.Save.Tip
data.value: Create or update the mapping from the form above.

data.name: XeroMap.Error.TenantGuid
data.value: Tenant ID must be a valid GUID.

data.name: XeroMap.Error.TargetRequired
data.value: This scope needs a target GUID (storefront, category, supplier, or product).

data.name: Imports.Template.Tip
data.value: Download a catalog import template (CSV) with two example products as a reference for the expected format.

data.name: Imports.Run.Tip
data.value: Start an import run using the built-in sample importer.

data.name: Rbac.Intro
data.value: Roles are data — compose any subset of the code-defined permissions. Built-in roles are seeded per tenant; you can edit their permissions, duplicate them, or build a new role by cherry-picking. Changes are enforced by the Identity PDP and re-evaluate active sessions.

data.name: Rbac.Tenant.Tip
data.value: The tenant whose roles you are managing (GUID).

data.name: Rbac.NewRole.Tip
data.value: Build a new custom role by cherry-picking permissions.

data.name: Rbac.NoRoles
data.value: No roles loaded for this tenant.

data.name: Rbac.Duplicate.Tip
data.value: Create a new role pre-filled with this role's permissions.

data.name: Rbac.Delete.Tip
data.value: Delete this custom role. Click twice to confirm.

data.name: Rbac.Field.Name.Tip
data.value: Human-readable role name shown to operators.

data.name: Rbac.Field.Key.Tip
data.value: Stable slug (lowercase, digits, hyphens). Set once at creation; can't change later.

data.name: Rbac.Field.Description.Tip
data.value: Optional: what this role is for.

data.name: Rbac.Permission.Tip
data.value: Grant this permission to the role.

data.name: Rbac.Save.Tip
data.value: Save the role and its selected permissions. Active sessions re-evaluate.

data.name: Rbac.Error.TenantGuid
data.value: Tenant ID must be a GUID.

data.name: Users.Subtitle
data.value: master admin · reset passwords & change emails

data.name: Users.Intro
data.value: Manage the accounts that sign in to a tenant. Resetting issues a one-time temporary password to read out; changing an email forces re-verification.

data.name: Users.TenantId.Tip
data.value: The tenant whose users you are managing.

data.name: Users.Load.Tip
data.value: Load the operator accounts for this tenant.

data.name: Users.NewEmail.Tip
data.value: The new sign-in email (must be unique in the tenant).

data.name: Users.SaveEmail.Tip
data.value: Save the new sign-in email — the user must verify it again.

data.name: Users.Empty
data.value: No users in this tenant yet.

data.name: Users.Status.EmailChanged
data.value: Email changed — the user must re-verify.

data.name: Entities.Intro
data.value: Tenant-scoped party master data + supplier onboarding. The change-request queue is maker-checker: a sensitive supplier change (bank account, contact, access) is requested by one operator and must be approved by a different one — separation of duties, with the decision audited.

data.name: Entities.Tenant.Tip
data.value: The tenant whose entities you are managing (GUID).

data.name: Entities.Field.LegalName.Tip
data.value: Registered legal name of the entity.

data.name: Entities.Field.TradingName.Tip
data.value: Optional 'doing business as' name; shown to operators when set.

data.name: Entities.Field.Type.Tip
data.value: Entity type is fixed after creation.

data.name: Entities.SuspendReason.Tip
data.value: Recorded when suspending a supplier (min 8 characters).

data.name: Entities.Action.Verify.Tip
data.value: Submit a Draft supplier for verification (requires a verified ABN/ACN, an email contact, and a current address on the entity).

data.name: Entities.Action.Verified.Tip
data.value: Mark verification complete (state: Pending verification → Pending approval).

data.name: Entities.Action.Activate.Tip
data.value: Activate a supplier whose verification is complete (state must be Pending approval).

data.name: Entities.Action.Suspend.Tip
data.value: Suspend an ACTIVE supplier — the reason on the left is recorded (8–500 chars).

data.name: Entities.Onboard.Note
data.value: Fill these to create a supplier-ready entity (all are required before verification). Leave blank to add later via Details.

data.name: Entities.Onboard.Email.Tip
data.value: A primary or operations email — required for supplier verification.

data.name: Entities.Create.Tip
data.value: Create the entity in this tenant.

data.name: Entities.DecisionReason.Tip
data.value: Recorded with the decision; optional for approve, required (8–500 characters) when rejecting.

data.name: Entities.MakerChecker
data.value: You raised this request — a different admin must decide it (maker-checker).

data.name: Entities.Approve.OwnTip
data.value: Maker-checker: the requester cannot approve their own request.

data.name: Entities.Reject.Tip
data.value: Reject this change request — the decision reason above is required (8–500 chars).

data.name: Entities.Reject.OwnTip
data.value: Maker-checker: the requester cannot reject their own request.

data.name: Entities.Error.TenantGuid
data.value: Tenant ID must be a GUID.

data.name: Entities.Error.SuspendReason
data.value: Suspend reason must be at least 8 characters.

data.name: Entities.Error.RejectReason
data.value: Rejecting requires a decision reason of at least 8 characters.

data.name: Entities.Error.ReasonTooLong
data.value: The decision reason must be at most 500 characters.

data.name: Entities.Details.Tip
data.value: Add the identifiers, contacts and addresses this entity needs for supplier onboarding.

data.name: Entities.Details.Intro
data.value: Required data for a {0}. Complete the checklist below, then submit the entity for supplier verification.

data.name: Entities.Details.Ready
data.value: Ready for supplier verification — all required fields are present.

data.name: Entities.Ident.None
data.value: No identifiers yet. A verified ABN or ACN is required for suppliers.

data.name: Entities.Ident.Verify.Tip
data.value: Attest that this identifier has been checked (marks it verified).

data.name: Entities.Ident.Value.Tip
data.value: ABN is 11 digits; ACN is 9 digits.

data.name: Entities.Ident.Add.Tip
data.value: Add this identifier to the entity.

data.name: Entities.Contact.None
data.value: No contacts yet. A primary or operations email is required for suppliers.

data.name: Entities.Contact.Purpose.Tip
data.value: What this contact is used for.

data.name: Entities.Contact.Add.Tip
data.value: Add this contact to the entity.

data.name: Entities.Addr.None
data.value: No addresses yet. A current registered office or warehouse address is required for suppliers.

data.name: Entities.Addr.Purpose.Tip
data.value: What this address is used for.

data.name: Entities.Addr.Add.Tip
data.value: Add this address to the entity.

data.name: Ops.Intro
data.value: Tenant/storefront catalog, publication, pricing, payment, payout, and Xero setup surfaces. Sensitive values (supplier cost, margins, bank tokens, provider account refs, accounting mappings) are intentionally summarized here; field-level policy/audit enforcement is provided by the owning service/Admin API as those mutation endpoints are expanded.

data.name: Ops.TenantId.Tip
data.value: The tenant (legal operator) whose commerce config you are managing (GUID).

data.name: Ops.LoadStorefronts.Tip
data.value: Load every storefront belonging to this tenant.

data.name: Ops.NotReadyIntro
data.value: This storefront is not ready to go live yet:

data.name: Ops.Field.PublicUrl.Tip
data.value: Public storefront URL used in customer-facing links.

data.name: Ops.Field.Currency.Tip
data.value: ISO 4217 currency for this storefront. Independent of the interface language.

data.name: Ops.Field.TaxRegime.Tip
data.value: Region tax rule. AU GST / EU VAT are tax-INCLUSIVE: shelf prices already contain the tax (shoppers pay the listed price; tax shown informationally). US sales tax is ADDED at checkout on top of listed prices (ADR-0038).

data.name: Ops.Field.TaxBps.Tip
data.value: Tax rate in basis points, e.g. 1000 = 10%. For AU GST / EU VAT this is the rate CONTAINED in shelf prices; for US it is ADDED at checkout (ADR-0038).

data.name: Ops.Field.Visibility.Tip
data.value: Who can see the storefront: Public (live) or Private (draft).

data.name: Ops.CreateStorefront.Tip
data.value: Create the storefront from the fields on the left.

data.name: Ops.Manage.Tip
data.value: Open this storefront's settings, domains and product publication.

data.name: Ops.Preview.Tip
data.value: Move the storefront to Preview (readiness is checked).

data.name: Ops.Activate.Tip
data.value: Take the storefront live (readiness is checked).

data.name: Ops.Pause.Tip
data.value: Pause the storefront — it stops serving shoppers.

data.name: Ops.SaveSettings.Tip
data.value: Save the name, URL, currency, tax and visibility above.

data.name: Ops.DomainHost.Tip
data.value: Domain to map to this storefront (host only, no https://).

data.name: Ops.Canonical.Tip
data.value: The primary domain; others redirect to it (one canonical per storefront).

data.name: Ops.AddDomain.Tip
data.value: Map the host above to this storefront.

data.name: Ops.CheckReadiness.Tip
data.value: List what this storefront still needs before it can go live.

data.name: Ops.Field.ProductId.Tip
data.value: The tenant product (GUID) to publish to this storefront.

data.name: Ops.Field.SeoTitle.Tip
data.value: Optional SEO title override for this product on this storefront.

data.name: Ops.Field.Fulfillment.Tip
data.value: How this product is fulfilled on this storefront (warehouse, dropship, digital…).

data.name: Ops.AssignProduct.Tip
data.value: Attach the product above to this storefront (it is not published yet).

data.name: Ops.ProductReadiness.Tip
data.value: List what this product still needs before it can be published here.

data.name: Ops.Publish.Tip
data.value: Publish the product on this storefront.

data.name: Ops.Unpublish.Tip
data.value: Remove the product from this storefront.

data.name: Ops.Policies
data.value: Pricing, payment, payout, and Xero policy surfaces

data.name: Ops.Card.Pricing.Body
data.value: SupplierCost, SellingPrice, tax mode, storefront overrides, coupons, automatic discounts, bundle discounts, and free shipping are modeled in Catalog Offers + Ordering. Per-product offers include price model + tiers.

data.name: Ops.Card.Payments.Body
data.value: Payments owns tenant defaults, storefront overrides, provider mode, readiness, live activation approval, and checkout snapshots. Use active eligible accounts only.

data.name: Ops.Card.Payouts.Body
data.value: Payments owns masked/tokenized bank accounts, approval-protected payout instructions, payable policies, and balanced supplier payable accruals.

data.name: Ops.Card.Xero.Body
data.value: Payments owns tenant default plus storefront/category/supplier/product mapping precedence. Xero remains downstream of ledger truth. Sync runs + the daily journal are operable now.

data.name: Ops.Card.Link.Tip
data.value: Open the admin page that manages this surface.

data.name: Pay.Intro
data.value: Create an account (Draft), submit it for approval, then activate it (a Live account needs an external account reference). Suspend or archive as needed. Only active accounts are eligible at checkout.

data.name: Pay.TenantId.Tip
data.value: The tenant whose payment accounts you are managing.

data.name: Pay.Empty
data.value: No payment accounts for this tenant yet.

data.name: Pay.MakeDefault.Tip
data.value: Make this the tenant default account (unsets the current default).

data.name: Pay.Field.Provider.LockedTip
data.value: Provider cannot change on an active account — suspend it first.

data.name: Pay.Field.Mode.Tip
data.value: Test for sandbox, Live for real charges.

data.name: Pay.Field.Mode.LockedTip
data.value: Mode cannot change on an active account — suspend it first.

data.name: Pay.Field.ExtRef.Tip
data.value: Provider account id — required to activate a Live account.

data.name: Pay.Create.Tip
data.value: Create the account in Draft — submit and activate it afterwards.

data.name: Pay.Status.Default
data.value: Account is now the tenant default.

data.name: Payouts.Intro
data.value: Create tokenized supplier bank accounts from your vault reference, approve or reject them, and create the active payout instruction for a supplier. Raw bank details must never be entered here.

data.name: Payouts.TenantId.Tip
data.value: The tenant whose supplier payout setup you are managing.

data.name: Payouts.Supplier.Tip
data.value: Active suppliers for this tenant; filters the lists and is used by the new bank account form.

data.name: Payouts.SupplierId.Tip
data.value: No active suppliers were found for this tenant — enter a supplier entity GUID manually.

data.name: Payouts.EditBank.Tip
data.value: Edit masked details — changing the banking identity resets approval to pending.

data.name: Payouts.EditBank.Note
data.value: Masked display values and the vault token only — never raw bank details. Changing country, masked numbers or the token resets an approved account to pending approval.

data.name: Payouts.Field.AccountName.Tip
data.value: Masked display account holder/name from the vault/KYC system.

data.name: Payouts.Field.BankCountry.Tip
data.value: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code, e.g. AU.

data.name: Payouts.Field.TokenRef.Tip
data.value: Reference to the vaulted/tokenized account. Do not paste raw bank details.

data.name: Payouts.CreateBank.Tip
data.value: Create the tokenized bank account — it starts pending approval.

data.name: Payouts.Instruction.Edit.Tip
data.value: Change this instruction's cadence or route it to another approved bank account.

data.name: Payouts.Field.BankAccount.Tip
data.value: Only Active bank accounts for the same supplier can receive payouts.

data.name: Payouts.Field.Cadence.Tip
data.value: How often this supplier is paid.

data.name: Payouts.Field.ApprovedBank.Tip
data.value: Only Active bank accounts can receive payout instructions.

data.name: Payouts.Instruction.NeedActiveBank
data.value: Approve a bank account first — a payout instruction can only route to an active (approved) bank account.

data.name: Payouts.CreateInstruction.Tip
data.value: Create the active payout instruction for the selected bank account's supplier.

data.name: Payouts.Status.BankUpdatedPending
data.value: Bank account updated — banking identity changed, so it is pending approval again.

data.name: Payouts.Error.TenantGuid
data.value: Tenant ID must be a valid GUID.

data.name: Payouts.Error.SupplierGuid
data.value: Supplier entity ID must be a valid GUID.

data.name: Payouts.Error.ChooseBankForInstruction
data.value: Choose an active bank account for this instruction.

data.name: Mc.Intro
data.value: Activity comes from the central Audit projection; jobs from the Workflow service. Data is via owning-service APIs only — never by reading service DBs directly (mt6_14).

data.name: Mc.Kpi.Activity.Tip
data.value: Audit events recorded in the last 24 hours.

data.name: Mc.Kpi.Orders.Tip
data.value: All orders in the admin read model.

data.name: Mc.Kpi.Confirmed.Tip
data.value: Orders whose payment has been captured.

data.name: Mc.Kpi.Revenue.Tip
data.value: Gross total of confirmed and refunded orders in this currency (major units); one tile per currency.

data.name: Mc.Kpi.RmasAwaitingDecision.Tip
data.value: Return requests that still need an operator to approve or deny.

data.name: Mc.Kpi.RmasAwaitingReturn.Tip
data.value: Approved returns waiting for the physical item to arrive.

data.name: Mc.Kpi.RmasRefundPending.Tip
data.value: Refund requested and in-flight — not yet completed.

data.name: Mc.Kpi.CheckoutsInFlight.Tip
data.value: Checkout sagas awaiting payment (not yet confirmed or cancelled).

data.name: Mc.Kpi.SubsActive.Tip
data.value: Active or trialing subscriptions that will renew.

data.name: Mc.Kpi.DropshipOpen.Tip
data.value: Supplier orders requested or accepted, awaiting tracking.

data.name: Mc.Kpi.DropshipTracking.Tip
data.value: Supplier orders that returned a tracking number.

data.name: Mc.Kpi.DropshipFailed.Tip
data.value: Supplier orders the provider rejected or failed to forward.

data.name: Mc.Kpi.NotifSent.Tip
data.value: Emails delivered in the last 24 hours.

data.name: Mc.Kpi.AuditEvents.Tip
data.value: Every audit event in the projection for this tenant.

data.name: Mc.Kpi.JobRuns.Tip
data.value: Scheduled job runs reported by the Workflow service.

data.name: Mc.Kpi.FailedJobs.Tip
data.value: Job runs that ended in Failed — investigate before they compound.

data.name: Mc.NoAudit
data.value: No audit activity yet. It appears as operators act (RBAC, supplier, entity changes…).

data.name: Mc.NoJobs
data.value: No job runs recorded yet (the Payments daily-journal job reports here).

data.name: Mc.Bus.Unreachable
data.value: Management API unreachable (config MessageBus:ManagementUrl, dev default http://localhost:15672). Queue stats appear when the broker's management plugin is up.

data.name: Mc.Bus.Consumers.Tip
data.value: Consumers currently attached across all queues.

data.name: Mc.Bus.Ready.Tip
data.value: Messages waiting to be delivered. A growing number means consumers are behind.

data.name: Mc.Bus.Unacked.Tip
data.value: Messages delivered but not yet acknowledged.

data.name: Mc.Bus.DeadLettered.Tip
data.value: Messages parked in dead-letter queues — a consumer is failing.

data.name: Mc.Bus.DlqWarning
data.value: ⚠ Dead-letter queues holding messages — these consumers are failing:

data.name: Mc.Bus.Busiest
data.value: Busiest queues (top 10 by depth, then publish rate)

data.name: Mc.Bus.Busiest.Tip
data.value: Expand to see the deepest and busiest queues.

data.name: Mc.Link.Grafana.Tip
data.value: Open the Grafana RED-metrics dashboard in a new tab.

data.name: Mc.Link.Loki.Tip
data.value: Open Grafana Explore on the Loki datasource in a new tab.

data.name: Mc.Link.Tempo.Tip
data.value: Open Grafana Explore on the Tempo datasource in a new tab.

data.name: Mc.Link.Mimir.Tip
data.value: Open Grafana Explore on the Mimir datasource in a new tab.

data.name: Mc.Obs.Subtitle
data.value: live · Loki / Tempo / Mimir HTTP APIs · read-only

data.name: Mc.Obs.Loki.Tip
data.value: Loki log store readiness (/ready). Red means logs are not being ingested.

data.name: Mc.Obs.Tempo.Tip
data.value: Tempo trace store readiness (/ready). Red means traces are not being ingested.

data.name: Mc.Obs.Mimir.Tip
data.value: Mimir metric store readiness (/ready). Red means metrics are not being ingested.

data.name: Mc.Obs.LogLines.Tip
data.value: Log lines ingested by Loki across all services in the last hour.

data.name: Mc.Obs.ErrorLogs.Tip
data.value: Error-level log lines across all services in the last hour. Anything above zero deserves a look.

data.name: Mc.Obs.Traces.Tip
data.value: Recent traces found by Tempo search over the last hour (capped at 50).

data.name: Mc.Obs.Services.Tip
data.value: Services with HTTP request metrics landing in Mimir.

data.name: Sec.Intro
data.value: Two-factor authentication for your operator account, and this tenant's MFA policy.

data.name: Sec.Enabled
data.value: ✅ MFA is enabled on this account. Every sign-in asks for an authenticator code (recovery codes work too).

data.name: Sec.Required
data.value: ⚠️ The effective MFA policy requires a second factor for this account — enroll now.

data.name: Sec.EnableMfa.Tip
data.value: Generates a TOTP secret. Add it to an authenticator app (manual entry), then confirm with a code.

data.name: Sec.SecretPrompt
data.value: Add this secret to your authenticator app (manual entry / time-based):

data.name: Sec.Code.Tip
data.value: The current 6-digit code shown by your authenticator — proves the secret was captured.

data.name: Sec.Confirm.Tip
data.value: Confirm enrolment with the code above and reveal your recovery codes.

data.name: Sec.RecoveryCodes
data.value: Recovery codes — store them now, they are not shown again:

data.name: Sec.Policy.Summary
data.value: Platform minimum: {0} · Effective: {1}. A tenant policy can only strengthen the platform floor. Note: users are only challenged once enrolled — "required" prompts unenrolled users to enroll, it never locks them out.

data.name: Sec.Policy.Tip
data.value: How strongly MFA is required for this tenant's users. 'Privileged' targets admin accounts.

data.name: Sec.Policy.Save.Tip
data.value: Apply the selected MFA policy to this tenant.

data.name: Sec.Webhooks.Intro
data.value: Provider webhook secrets (e.g. Stripe's whsec_…). Values are stored server-side and only ever shown masked. To rotate: add the new secret (both verify), switch the provider, then deactivate the old one.

data.name: Sec.Deactivate.Tip
data.value: Stop accepting webhooks signed with this secret. Do this only after the provider has cut over to a newer one.

data.name: Sec.NewSecret.Provider.Tip
data.value: The provider whose webhook this secret signs — matches the /webhooks/{provider} route.

data.name: Sec.NewSecret.Value.Tip
data.value: Paste the signing secret from the provider dashboard. It is never displayed again.

data.name: Sec.AddSecret.Tip
data.value: Register the signing secret for the selected provider.

data.name: Sec.Status.MfaEnabled
data.value: MFA enabled. Your next sign-in will ask for a code.

data.name: Sec.Error.CodeRejected
data.value: Code not accepted — check the authenticator and try again.

data.name: Currency.Tip
data.value: Currency (ISO 4217) this price is expressed in. Picked from the full list — never free-typed.

data.name: Image.Tip
data.value: Paste an image URL, or upload a local file (PNG/JPEG/WebP/GIF, max 10 MB).

data.name: Image.Browse.Tip
data.value: Choose a local image file to upload to the catalog object store.

data.name: Error.Heading
data.value: An error occurred while processing your request.

data.name: Error.DevMode.Body1
data.value: Swapping to Development environment will display more detailed information about the error that occurred.

data.name: Error.DevMode.Body2
data.value: The Development environment shouldn't be enabled for deployed applications. It can result in displaying sensitive information from exceptions to end users. For local debugging, enable the Development environment by setting the ASPNETCORE_ENVIRONMENT environment variable to Development and restarting the app.

data.name: Nav.Subscriptions.Tip
data.value: Recurring subscriptions — renewal history, renew or cancel.

data.name: Subs.Intro
data.value: Recurring billing arrangements — their status, current period, and full renewal history.

data.name: Subs.Filter.Tip
data.value: Show only subscriptions in the chosen status.

data.name: Subs.Expand.Tip
data.value: Show subscriber, subscription, and renewal history.

data.name: Subs.Renew.Tip
data.value: Charge the next period via the payment rail and advance the subscription.

data.name: Subs.Cancel.Tip
data.value: End this subscription — no further renewals.

data.name: Orders.Return.Tip
data.value: Open a return (RMA) the customer sends back before refunding — walk it through the RMA queue.

data.name: Orders.Status.ReturnOpened
data.value: Return opened — track it in the RMA queue.

data.name: Home.Kpi.Refunds.Tip
data.value: Total refunded (ledger revenue.refunds) across all refund paths.

data.name: Mc.Kpi.RefundsValue.Tip
data.value: Total refunded per currency (ledger revenue.refunds) — reflects every refund path.
